existing_api_routes: src/app/api/market/regime -- uses detectRegime() from MarketRegimeEngine (live compute)
naming_conflict_note: MarketRegimeResult is used as a TypeScript interface in MarketRegimeEngine.ts; Prisma model is accessed via prisma.marketRegimeResult (camelCase)
components_not_to_reuse: detectRegime() -- computes live from MarketIndex; T-09 must read persisted table
recommended_integration_path: New App Router API route: src/app/api/daily-report/regime/route.ts + service src/lib/marketRegimeResult.ts

answers.add_api_route_or_service: Both: new service function + new API route
answers.existing_daily_report_ui_to_integrate: DailyReportEngine integration via proposal (marketSummary already has regime field)
